mentions.note: Crypto miner turned AI data center; successful IPO sparked frenzy; up 33-40% YTD in 3 weeks; fell 50-57% in Oct-Nov froth; take profits aggressively.
Data center AI company dependent on OpenAI orders; if OpenAI capital raises fail or loses market share, Coreweave loses major revenue driver.

Interview with CEO Michael Intrader on Squawk on Street; won huge order from Anthropic; Cramer pressed on profitability path, Intrader candid (could be profitable in 3 months but opportunity too large); transparency rewarded with 11% stock gain.
Aggressive buy; infrastructure provider for AI data centers; new company with lots of debt; expect volatility but fundamentals terrific.
Heavily shorted, building new data centers aggressively. Potential financing/convertible deal could pop stock; watch for CEO announcement (Mike Linton Traeger).
Too hot and volatile for most investors; exhibits extreme swings (down 20%, up 20%, down 20%). Not suitable for conservative portfolios.
Data center infrastructure builder mentioned by Nvidia; GPU/cloud infrastructure play benefiting from AI capex.

Pure-play neocloud; $100B backlog visibility. Revenue ramp $13B→$25B→$40B (2026–2028); 2028 EPS $3.36, 2029 $6.92. Key risk: backlog-to-profit conversion post-debt/power. Cheaper than Nvidia's last stake price.
